zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fairfax於大約1226年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾沃爾頓時，他的父親William Fairfax II25歲，母親Mary Flower27歲。他和Agnes Serevaux至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1261年在英國英格蘭越可爾斯頓享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾比爾布盧。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fairfax was born about 1226, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Fairfax II, was 25 and his mother, Mary Flower, was 27. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Serevaux. He died in 1261, in Steeton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Bilbrough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fairfax est né environ 1226, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Fairfax II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Flower, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Serevaux. Il est décédé en 1261, à Steeton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Bilbrough, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er starb 1261 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Steeton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bilbrough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Serevaux. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fairfaxが約1226年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父William Fairfax IIは25歳，母Mary Flowerは27歳であった。彼はAgnes Serevauxとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1261年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスティートンで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアビルブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fairfax(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fairfax II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Flower(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Agnes Serevaux(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스티턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 빌브루그h에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fairfax родился около 1226 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Fairfax II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Flower, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes Serevaux. Он умер в 1261 г. в местности ститон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности билброую, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
